main.summary: Parses an object instance from String input using reflection.

field.name: Data
field.summary: Input payload forwarded to reflected parse method.

field.name: Formatter
field.summary: Format provider forwarded to reflected parse method.

property.name: Provider
property.summary: Type provider used to materialize parser target type.
property.remarks: Configure active context, probe assemblies, directories, in-memory assemblies, and assembly identities directly through this provider.

constructor.name: Constructor
constructor.summary: Create a parser with the requested resolution mode.

method.name: CanParseType
method.summary: Determine whether a runtime type exposes a supported parse signature.
method.returns: True when the type is `System.String` or exposes a supported parse signature; otherwise false.

method.name: CanParseString
method.summary: Determine whether a type name resolves to a type that exposes a supported parse signature.
method.returns: True when the resolved type exposes a supported parse signature; otherwise false.

method.name: CreateString
method.summary: Create parser preconfigured with target type name.
method.param: Resolution mode for the created parser.

method.name: WithData
method.summary: Fluent method to configure input data.

method.name: WithContext
method.summary: Fluent method to configure the provider active load context.

method.name: WithFormatter
method.summary: Fluent method to configure format provider.

method.name: SetContext
method.summary: Configure the provider active load context.
method.returns: True when the context is accepted; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Fails after successful parse. This is a convenience passthrough to .

method.name: TryParse
method.summary: Attempt to parse configured data into configured type.
method.returns: True on successful parse or when already parsed; otherwise false.
method.remarks: Signature preference order is: direct `String` assignment for `System.String`, then `Boolean TryParse(String, IFormatProvider, out T)`, then `Boolean TryParse(String, out T)`, then `T Parse(String, IFormatProvider)`, then `T Parse(String)`.

method.name: Parse
method.summary: Parse configured data into configured type and return the parsed value.
method.returns: Parsed value when successful; otherwise null.

method.name: FindTryParseMethod
method.remarks: Prefers `Boolean TryParse(String, IFormatProvider, out T)` and falls back to `Boolean TryParse(String, out T)`.

method.name: FindParseMethod
method.remarks: Prefers `T Parse(String, IFormatProvider)` and falls back to `T Parse(String)`.

method.name: TryInvokeTryParseMethod
method.summary: Invoke a reflected static `TryParse` method using the configured input and formatter.
method.param: Parsed output value when invocation succeeds.
method.returns: True when the reflected `TryParse` invocation succeeds and produces a non-null value; otherwise false.

method.name: TryInvokeParseMethod
method.summary: Invoke a reflected static `Parse` method using the configured input and formatter.
method.param: Parsed output value when invocation succeeds.
method.returns: True when the reflected `Parse` invocation succeeds and produces a non-null value; otherwise false.

method.name: IsTryParseMethod
method.summary: Determine whether a reflected method matches one of the supported static `TryParse` signatures for the target type.
method.param: True to validate the formatter-aware overload; otherwise validate the string-only overload.
method.returns: True when the method matches a supported `TryParse` signature; otherwise false.

method.name: IsParseMethod
method.summary: Determine whether a reflected method matches one of the supported static `Parse` signatures for the target type.
method.param: True to validate the formatter-aware overload; otherwise validate the string-only overload.
method.returns: True when the method matches a supported `Parse` signature; otherwise false.
